text: When the Sun and Moon align, tides soar to new heights. But when they pull at right angles? Tides calm down. Welcome to the world of tides! Spring tides—higher and stronger—occur during full and new moons. Neap tides, on the other hand, show up during the first and last quarters. They keep things moderate. Understanding these cycles helps us predict coastal behaviors and marine life patterns. Fascinating, right? Want to dive deeper into science? Hit that follow! See you next time!
